quote: We moved our 12-person sales team from Pipedrive to NimbusCRM because the add-ons and per-seat costs kept creeping up. Setup took under a day and we haven't looked back.
NimbusCRM felt instantly familiar but lighter. Our reps were closing within the first week, and reporting is simple enough that everyone actually uses it.
The migration tool pulled over our contacts, orgs, deals, and activities in minutes. We manually recreated two automations and called it done—at about half our previous monthly cost.
